title: Book Levels MicroSim
description: Interactive p5.js visualization for book levels microsim
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: educational technology
data visualization
p5.js
learningObjectives: Identify the five levels of intelligent textbooks, from static texts through interactive, adaptive, and chatbot-enabled books to autonomous AI textbooks
Distinguish the defining features of each level, such as hyperlinks and embedded MicroSims at Level 2 versus GraphRAG chatbot tutors at Level 4
Explain why student-data privacy concerns escalate as textbooks progress from Level 3 adaptivity to Level 5 autonomy
Classify a given textbook or courseware product into the appropriate level based on its interactivity and AI capabilities
